hypothesis_raw: Good morning, Mr. Johnson. What brings you in today? I've been having this pressure in my chest. It started about two hours ago. Can you describe what it feels like? Like something heavy sitting on my chest, dull, not sharp. Does it radiate anywhere, your arm, jaw, back? A little into my left arm and up to my jaw. On a scale of one to ten, how bad is it right now? Around us. On a scale of one to ten, how bad is it right now? Around a six. It was worse when I was walking to the car. Anything make it better or worse? It got better when I sat down, worse with walking. Any shortness of breath, sweating, or nausea? I felt sweaty at first, a little short of breath too. You said it started two hours ago. Was this the first episode, or have you felt it before? hours ago was this the first episode or have you felt it before actually now that i think about it i had something similar yesterday evening after dinner it went away in a few minutes so i didn't mention it got it any history of heart disease high blood pressure or diabetes high blood pressure for about ten years my father had a heart attack at 58. what medications are you on What medications are you on? Amlodipine for my blood pressure, atorvastatin for cholesterol, and a daily aspirin. Any smoking or alcohol? I smoked a pack a day for 30 years, quit five years ago. I want to get an ECG and a troponin and apply the heart score to assess your risk.

hypothesis_raw: Hello, Miss Smith. Tell me what happened. I passed out this morning. I was standing in the kitchen, and the next thing I knew I was on the floor. Any warning before you passed out? I felt lightheaded, a bit sweaty, and my vision went gray around the edges. How long were you out? My husband said maybe ten seconds. I came to quickly. Any chest pain, palpitations, or shortness of breath before Any chest pain, palpitations, or shortness of breath before it happened? No chest pain. My heart felt like it was racing for a second, but it was quick. Did you bite your tongue or lose bladder control? No, nothing like that. You said your heart was racing. Was that before or after you felt lightheaded? Actually, thinking about it, the racing came first. Then the lightheaded feeling, then I went down. thinking about it, the racing came first. Then the lightheaded feeling, then I went down. Okay, that's important. Any similar episodes before? I felt dizzy when I stand up quickly, but I've never passed out before. Any recent illness, fluid loss, or changes in medication? I had a stomach bug two days ago, some diarrhea. I haven't been drinking much water. What medications do you take? I haven't been drinking much water. What medications do you take? I'm on metoprolol and hydrochlorothiazide for blood pressure and a baby aspirin. I'd like to check orthostatic vitals and get an EKG.
